name: hanauta-wallpaper-theme
description: Applies a live VS Code / VSCodium theme from Hanauta's wallpaper palette file.

hanautaTheme.paletteFile.description: Path to the shared palette file generated by the i3 Hanauta setup.

hanautaTheme.autoApply.description: Automatically apply palette changes when the palette file changes.

hanautaTheme.applyEditorTokens.description: Also recolor syntax/token colors. Disabled by default because some palettes can be too aggressive for code.
